title: boerhavia ciliata
intro: Boerhavia ciliata, also known as red spiderling or red star, is a plant species that belongs to the Nyctaginaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic activities. The health benefits of Boerhavia ciliata include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and reduce blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powders, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
